settings.heading: MLS is loved by over 50,000 customers

settings.text: A family business started from a butcher shop in Ibra, Oman, 1977- today we exist to nourish people with nature's finest red meat.
MLS brings you dry-aged meat perfection for the first time in Oman. Where meat ages with flavor & texture, resulting in a luxurious experience.
